isolation.boundary: Read-only verification, no shared state, no services needed

steps.action: Read file content and verify worker protocol elements
steps.expected: Content includes peer channels, implementation instructions, verification protocol
steps.observed:
✓ Peer channels: spawn_agent, post_message, wait_for_message, read_messages, close_agent documented
✓ Implementation instructions: 5-step protocol from reading assignment to completion
✓ Verification protocol: 'Verification Expectations' section with build/test/lint requirements and checker integration

steps.expected: Instructions include verification via peer channels before completion
steps.observed: Protocol step 4 explicitly describes spawning peer checker, posting verification request, collecting findings, addressing issues, and closing agent when complete

keyElements: Channel tools: spawn_agent, post_message, wait_for_message, read_messages, close_agent
Protocol sections: Goal, Protocol (5 steps), Verification Expectations, Commit And Completion
Verification flow: local verification → peer checker → address issues → signal done/failed

steps.action: Read file content and verify checker protocol elements
steps.expected: Content includes build/test verification, check record creation, verification protocol
steps.observed:
✓ Build/test verification: Explicit commands listed (go build ./..., filtered go test, go vet ./...)
✓ Check record: 'cogent check create <work-id> --result pass|fail' documented in step 5
✓ Verification protocol: 7-step protocol from reading assignment to closing agent after exchange complete

steps.action: Verify structured instructions for independent verification
steps.expected: Instructions include code review, validator execution, check record creation, and result reporting
steps.observed: Protocol covers: (1) read context, (2) review code diff, (3) run validators, (4) decide pass/fail, (5) create check record, (6) post result back to worker, (7) handle follow-up discussion

keyElements: Build/test commands: go build ./..., filtered go test, go vet ./...
Check record creation: cogent check create <work-id> --result pass|fail
Protocol sections: Goal, Protocol (7 steps), Reporting Expectations
Independent verification: code review + validator evidence → pass/fail decision

summary: Tested 2 assertions: 2 passed. Both worker and checker skill files exist with complete protocol documentation including peer channel tools, verification steps, and check record creation.
